course_title: Impact Academy 3: Delivering and Capturing New Values

learning_outcomes.description: Develop and implement a cogent and competitive strategy to exploit an identified opportunity.
Working individually or in teams, engage, influence and secure support from a network of stakeholders to enable execution of the value creation strategy.

Build a coalition which is committed to delivering new value to multiple stakeholders with ethical and socially responsible leadership demonstrated through humility, empathy, authenticity, and agility.

assessments.assessment_title: Business Model Test Results (individual oral presentation with Q&A)
assessments.task_description: Please Note: The presentation will be recorded for marking purposes per UQ Policy.
assessments.submission_guidelines: Students are to submit their presentation via Blackboard prior to presenting
assessments.deferral_or_extension: You may be able to apply for an extension.
assessments.additional_info: You may be able to apply for an extension.

assessments.task_description:
The Venture Build Workbook is the major assessment item for this course. It is the structured, cumulative record you maintain across the semester while developing your own venture: the experiments you run, the evidence you gather, the decisions you make, and your reflection on what the evidence tells you. You submit the completed workbook at the end of the course, and it is assessed as a whole.

This is a practice-based, evidence-led assessment. You are a practising founder working on a real venture; the workbook captures your applied work as you progress through a structured program.
assessments.submission_guidelines: You may be able to apply for an extension.
assessments.deferral_or_extension: You may be able to apply for an extension.
assessments.additional_info: You may be able to apply for an extension.
